content.text:
*(short laugh, slightly bitter)*

Oh, it has a field day with that. It's like — "you can't even do *self-improvement* right." Which is... yeah. Very on brand. I've read the books, I know about the negativity bias, I understand the neuroscience of self-criticism, I can explain polyvagal theory to you, and yet here I am. Which the voice then uses as evidence. "You know better and you're still like this." 

*(gestures vaguely)*

It's a very efficient system, actually. Very thorough.
